title: feat: add community quest issue template and related workflows
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: The hive posts bounties
gist.blurb: We've added an automated Community Quest system. Pick up a quest, write some code, and the robots will automatically wire Pollen credits to your account when it merges.
gist.summary: Added a complete automated workflow for Community Quests, handling everything from issue templates and status tracking to idempotent Pollen payouts.
gist.impact: Contributors can now claim bountied issues and automatically receive Pollen credits when their pull requests are merged.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee as an adventurer looking at an RPG-style quest board. The board has glowing lime green bounty scrolls pinned to it. The Nomnom creature is eating a completed quest paper.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny adventurer's hat, looking at a wooden quest board covered in glowing lime green (#ecf874) bounty scrolls. The round tan Nomnom creature sits nearby, happily eating a completed quest paper. Soft pastel gradient background with warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic, wholesome RPG vibes.
